prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约7294→6899→11962→12096，2023年较2022年小幅前移，2024年大幅后移至11962名，2025年基本持平于12096名；近两年 位次明显后移，整体竞争格局有所松动；2022–2025年理科/物理类计划分别为37、35、35、36人，2026年计划增至40人，较2025年扩招约11.1%，扩招幅 度较大，有利于降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科2026年主榜第57名，近年排名稳定在51–57区间，属于中上水平财经类院校；2026年声誉数据中未出现对外经济贸易大学相关负面舆情，整体声誉平稳；抖音综合热度排名第91位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为A类学科，在财经类院校中学科实力突出，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热 度2024年评估为"分化观望"，较2021年高点有所降温；法学评估为"分化观望"（63.54）；工商管理类评估为"明显劝退"（42.96）。财经类整体热度趋于理性分化。四川省2026年高考报名总人数约5 3.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增加约15.6%，按近年物理类占比约61.5%估算，2026年物理类考生约32.9万，竞争基数显著扩大。；学校位于北京市，对四川省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在四川招生计划占比较高，2025年物理类36人、历史类30人，属于在京高校中对川招生规模较大的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12096名、2026年扩招约11.1%以及四川省物理类考生增加约15.6%带来的竞争加剧，扩招的宽松效应与考生增量的紧缩 效应相互对冲，但考生增量幅度更大，预计录取位次较；预测最低位次约12802名，区间12302–13302名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 7294 → 6899 → 11962 → 12096. In 2023, there was a slight improvement compared to 2022, but in 2024, there was a significant drop to 11962, and in 2025, it remained roughly stable at 12096. In the past two years, rankings have notably declined, indicating a loosening of the overall competitive landscape. From 2022 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Science/Physics Category were 37, 35, 35, and 36 respectively. In 2026, the plan increases to 40, an expansion of about 11.1% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase and helps lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 57th on the main list, with recent rankings stable in the 51–57 range, placing it among upper-middle-level finance and economics institutions. In 2026 reputation data, no negative public opinion related to the University of International Business and Economics appeared, indicating overall stable reputation. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average,' with moderate short video exposure and no clear signs of rising application interest. Applied Economics is rated A, Business Administration A, and Foreign Language and Literature A-, all A-level disciplines, highlighting strong academic strength among finance and economics institutions, which continues to attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors in 2024 is assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see,' cooling compared to the 2021 peak. Law is assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see' (63.54). Business Administration is assessed as 'clearly discouraged' (42.96). The overall popularity of finance and economics majors is trending toward rational divergence. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000). Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 61.5%, it is estimated that there will be about 329,000 Physics Category candidates in 2026, significantly expanding the competitive base. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan accounts for a relatively high proportion, with 36 Physics Category and 30 History Category students in 2025, making it one of the larger-scale Beijing-based universities enrolling in Sichuan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 12096, the approximately 11.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition from an approximately 15.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in Sichuan Province, the easing effect of the expansion and the tightening effect of the candidate increase offset each other, but the candidate increase is larger. It is predicted that the minimum ranking will be approximately 12802, with a range of 12302–13302.

It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Economics Category and Law Category as main choices, with Tier 1 Data Science and Big Data Technology and Financial Engineering as reach options, and Tier 3 Actuarial Science and Business Administration Category as safety options. If the ranking is better than 12302, prioritize reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.
